'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=3ZZbSnbClpIW3xevTjuuLylzQhl27Ys4_fg9s55Weqc-1774608130-1.0.1.1-.jx5EHRDgZ5ENra_KVCmFhh5pUu.hEUMXuhsMjFgcAs"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
